LIHEAP: Heating-assistance need is present and income 2550 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 5200. Medicaid/CHIP: Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 5200. WIC: Income 2550 is within the prototype WIC limit 6900. This is a prescreening and next-step guide, not an official determination.
